question: Where is the closest restaurant?
gold_sql: SELECT name FROM campus_places WHERE name IS NOT NULL AND name != 'nan' AND amenity ILIKE '%restaurant%' ORDER BY name ASC LIMIT 5;
pred_sql: SELECT cp.name, cp.amenity, cp.geometry, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY cp.geometry::geography <-> p.geometry::geography) AS distance_rank FROM campus_places cp JOIN campus_places p ON cp.name = p.name WHERE cp.name IS NOT NULL AND cp.name != 'nan' AND cp.amenity ILIKE '%restaurant%') SELECT rr.name, rr.amenity, rr.distance_rank FROM ranked_restaurants rr AND (rr.distance_rank = 1 ORDER BY rr.distance_rank ASC LIMIT 1;);
raw_pred_sql: SELECT cp.name, cp.amenity, cp.geometry, row_number() OVER (ORDER BY cp.geometry::geography <-> p.geometry::geography) AS distance_rank FROM campus_places cp JOIN campus_places p ON cp.name = p.name WHERE cp.name IS NOT NULL AND cp.name != 'nan' AND cp.amenity ILIKE '%restaurant%') SELECT rr.name, rr.amenity, rr.distance_rank FROM ranked_restaurants rr WHERE rr.distance_rank = 1 ORDER BY rr.distance_rank ASC LIMIT 1;
